headline: Essex Property Trust (ESS) – Among the 10 Most Profitable Dividend Stocks to Invest In Now
summary: With a net profit margin of 31.57%, Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) is included among the 10 Most Profitable Dividend Stocks to Invest In Now. On June 8, Evercore ISI raised its price recommendation on Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) to $296 from $295. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm said it […]
